quotes.text: The best of people are those who are most beneficial to people.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Speak good or remain silent.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: The strong person is not the one who can wrestle someone else down. The strong person is the one who can control himself when he is angry.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Make things easy and do not make them difficult. Give good news and do not drive people away.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Seek knowledge from the cradle to the grave.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: He who is not merciful to others, will not be treated mercifully.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: The best among you are those who have the best manners and character.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Do not waste water even if you were at a running stream.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: A person's true wealth is the good he or she does in the world.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Kindness is a mark of faith, and whoever has not kindness has not faith.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Patience is the key to relief.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Be in this world as if you were a stranger or a traveler along a path.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Every act of goodness is charity.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: The best jihad is to speak a word of truth to an oppressive ruler.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: By Allah, he does not believe! By Allah, he does not believe! By Allah, he does not believe! It was asked: Who, O Messenger of Allah? He said: The one whose neighbor does not feel safe from his evil.
quotes.author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quotes.text: Be truthful, for truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: Without knowledge, action is useless and knowledge without action is futile.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: Good actions are a guard against the blows of adversity.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: The more knowledge you have, the greater will be your fear of Allah.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: If an ignorant person is attracted by the things of the world, that is bad. But if a learned person is attracted by the things of the world, that is worse.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: Do not follow vain desires, for verily he who prospers is preserved from lust, greed and anger.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: Preach not to others what they should eat, but eat as becomes you and be silent.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: Do not look down upon any Muslim, for even the most inferior believer is great in the eyes of God.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: The greatest truth is honesty, and the greatest falsehood is dishonesty.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: He who avoids complaint invites happiness.
quotes.author: Abu Bakr As-Siddiq (RA)

quotes.text: Do not deceive or be faithless even with your enemy.
quotes.author: Umar ibn Al-Khattab (RA)

quotes.text: The most beloved of people to Allah are those who are most beneficial to people.
quotes.author: Umar ibn Al-Khattab (RA)

quotes.text: Patience is the healthiest ingredient of our life.
quotes.author: Umar ibn Al-Khattab (RA)

quotes.text: Hold yourself accountable before you are held accountable.
quotes.author: Umar ibn Al-Khattab (RA)

quotes.text: May God bless the man who says less and does more.
quotes.author: Umar ibn Al-Khattab (RA)

quotes.text: Knowledge is only achieved through learning and patience is only achieved through trying to be patient.
quotes.author: Ali ibn Abi Talib (RA)

quotes.text: A person's intellect becomes apparent from his speech, and his merit is known through his actions.
quotes.author: Ali ibn Abi Talib (RA)

quotes.text: Do not let your difficulties fill you with anxiety; after all, it is only in the darkest nights that stars shine more brightly.
quotes.author: Ali ibn Abi Talib (RA)

quotes.text: The tongue is like a lion. If you let it loose, it will wound someone.
quotes.author: Ali ibn Abi Talib (RA)

quotes.text: Two things define you: your patience when you have nothing, and your attitude when you have everything.
quotes.author: Ali ibn Abi Talib (RA)

quotes.text: There is no wealth like knowledge, and no poverty like ignorance.
quotes.author: Ali ibn Abi Talib (RA)

quotes.text: Impossible is a word to be found only in the dictionary of fools.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: The world suffers a lot. Not because of the violence of bad people, but because of the silence of good people.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: Victory belongs to the most persevering.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: Courage is not having the strength to go on; it is going on when you don't have the strength.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: In politics, stupidity is not a handicap.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: The battlefield is a scene of constant chaos. The winner will be the one who controls that chaos.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: Great ambition is the passion of a great character. Those endowed with it may perform very good or very bad acts. All depends on the principles which direct them.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: A leader is a dealer in hope.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: Take time to deliberate, but when the time for action has arrived, stop thinking and go in.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to know your own genius and apply it relentlessly.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: Nothing is more difficult, and therefore more precious, than to be able to decide.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: Ability is nothing without opportunity.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: He who fears being conquered is sure of defeat.
quotes.author: Napoleon Bonaparte

quotes.text: I came, I saw, I conquered.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: Experience is the teacher of all things.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: It is easier to find men who will volunteer to die, than to find those who are willing to endure pain with patience.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: In war, events of importance are the result of trivial causes.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: If you must break the law, do it to seize power: in all other cases observe it.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: It is not these well-fed long-haired men that I fear, but the pale and the hungry-looking.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: The die is cast.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: What we wish, we readily believe, and what we ourselves think, we imagine others think also.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: Men willingly believe what they wish.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: Fortune, which has a great deal of power in other matters but especially in war, can bring about great changes in a situation through very slight forces.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: I love the name of honor, more than I fear death.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: No one is so brave that he is not disturbed by something unexpected.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar

quotes.text: It is better to create than to learn! Creating is the essence of life.
quotes.author: Julius Caesar
